updatedBy: Claude AI — Night shift Block 2: Commodity-agnostic foundations shipped (lib + schema + docs)
overallNote: Adjusted 97→87 to reflect vision-aligned scope. Prior 97% was Phase 6 against original master plan; Phase 7+ vision items (BRM, SRM, Info Walls, Multi-portal, Trade Lifecycle, commodity-agnostic schema) now first-class systems — honest total is lower against the full vision.
auditNote: Numbers rewritten 2026-04-23 after full live-site walkthrough. Granular per-ABC-report %. V1 legacy claims removed. /map page upgraded to a live command center showing currentWork + blockers + recentCommits.

currentWork.step: Vision alignment + Phase 7 kickoff — user is asleep, watching /map for autonomous progress
currentWork.description: User shared the April-16 Vision Handoff (MAXONS trading platform end-state) and asked for intelligent alignment + non-stop work overnight. New first-class systems added to /map: BRM (Broker Relationship Management), SRM (Supplier Relationship Management), Information Walls, Commodity-Agnostic Schema, Multi-Portal Frontend, Trade Lifecycle, ADELA Orchestrator, ATLAS Self-Developing Brain, Verified Social Network. Plan: align, scaffold commodity-agnostic foundation, scaffold BRM/SRM portals, wire info-wall helpers + audit logging, then full app walkthrough via Chrome MCP, fix issues found, iterate on UI polish + logic checks until morning. Pushes land every ~30–60 min so /map stays fresh.

blocks.name: Info walls scaffolding (audit_log table + helper + RLS policy doc)
Full app walkthrough via Chrome MCP
Trade lifecycle skeleton (offer states + margin engine stub)
Verified social network MVP (feed + post, gated on access_tier='verified')

recentCommits.message: Night shift: vision handoff aligned — Phase 7 + 9 new first-class systems on /map
Phase F1a: V1 Returning-User Popup (OTP verify + password set, global modal)
C5 round 2: dual-channel invite + tier filter + V1 badge + admin Verify User
Phase C5b + scope capture: CRM Bulk WhatsApp Invite + V1 popup/C5a/C5c on roadmap
Phase D MVP: PersonaBanner on /dashboard (9 personas × role-aware shortcuts)
Phase F3a: scraper default mode 'position' → 'all' (unlocks 4 dormant scrapers)
Fix pass (honest Systems %s + 2 new systems) + B6 Almanac section
Phase C4: News Sentiment Compare + Phase 6 percent refresh to 65%
Phase C3: Pricing Variety × Grade Compare view mode
Phase E1: /reports spinner hang fix + summary div-by-zero guard
progress.json: blocker resolved — workflow CNAME flip-flop permanently fixed
Remove CNAME file generation in auto-scrape workflow (via GitHub web UI)
Phase C2: Destinations Cross-Year × Country Compare
Phase E3a (2/2): actually land the AnimatedCounter fix
Phase B5: County Intelligence section with Land IQ empty state
Phase B4: Forecast Accuracy section (Subjective vs Objective vs Actual)
Phase B3 + C1: Variety Intelligence section on /forecasts + reusable FilterBar
Phase B2: piggy-back shipment + receipt parsers onto position-PDF fetch
Phase A2: upgrade /map into a live command center
fix: restore CNAME to cropsintel.com (workflow flip-flop bug)
Phase B1: fix backfill skip-bugs + receipts schema mismatch
Phase A: honesty pass — rewrite progress.json + drop V1 legacy claims
feat: add ProjectMap page at /map — live progress tracker

stats.lastScrapeNote: Workflow runs on push to main + cron (15th monthly, Mondays weekly). Last deploy timestamp is a proxy for last scrape.

v2Migration.title: V2 Migration to cropsintel.com
v2Migration.description: V2 is LIVE at cropsintel.com. DNS cutover done, V1 users migrated, 4 login methods deployed, edge functions redeployed from V2 source, SW killer active. Remaining launch work moved to Phase 6.

items.name: 65 V1 users migrated to V2 Supabase
4-method login system (WhatsApp+Pass, WhatsApp OTP, Email+Pass, Email Magic Link)
whatsapp-login edge function with V1 auto-migration
Forgot/Reset password flow + branded email templates
Admin Add/Delete users + Change Password form
All 4 edge functions redeployed from V2 GitHub source
SW killer deployed (kills V1 Workbox cache on phones)

phases.name: Data Foundation
phases.summary: 116 ABC position reports across 11 crop years ingested, PDF parser built, data integrity audit passed

phases.name: Stabilization
phases.summary: Auth rebuilt, 30+ fixes, widget stability, clean architecture patterns

phases.name: AI Systems
phases.summary: Claude API unified, Zyra floating widget, ElevenLabs voice, 4 edge functions live

phases.name: CRM + Soft Launch Gate
phases.summary: 6-tab CRM, 15 audit fixes, 12 AI enhancements, dashboard perf 30s→2-3s

phases.name: V2 Migration + Domain
phases.summary: cropsintel.com live, .net redirect, 65 users migrated, 4 login methods, edge functions redeployed from V2, SW killer shipped

phases.name: Honesty + Completion Sprint
phases.summary: 20+ phases shipped today (68%→97% against original master plan). Honesty pass, /map command center, scraper fixes, Variety/Forecast/County/Almanac Intelligence, FilterBar kit + 4 page retrofits, Destinations/Pricing/News compare modes, Pricing 4th view, CRM dual-channel invite + tier filter + admin Verify User, Persona Banner MVP, V1 Returning-User Popup, workflow CNAME blocker resolved via GitHub UI, scraper default mode → 'all' unlocking 4 dormant scrapers.

phases.name: Vision Alignment (from April 16 Handoff)
phases.summary: User shared full vision doc 2026-04-24 night. New first-class scope: BRM, SRM, Information Walls (DB+API), Multi-Portal Frontend, Trade Lifecycle + margin engine, ADELA orchestrator, ATLAS self-developing brain, Verified Social Network, commodity-agnostic schema. Non-negotiables: never hardcode 'almonds', always info-wall at DB+API, always audit-log, always multi-commodity-ready. Night-shift plan 10 blocks queued; nightShiftPlan object above.

phases.name: Relationship Spine (CRM+BRM+SRM with info walls)
phases.summary: Three distinct relationship graphs with strict information walls at DB (Postgres RLS) + API middleware + portal scoping. Customer sees only their pricing; broker sees only market intel + margin targets; supplier sees only own shipments + demand signals.

phases.name: Trade Lifecycle Execution
phases.summary: Offer → margin engine → customer view → request to buy (self-serve or assisted) → sales verification → WhatsApp contract link → interactive e-sign → fulfillment tracking. Zyra orchestrates lifecycle end-to-end.

phases.name: Atlas Autonomous Self-Development
phases.summary: Atlas reads own plan, AI council debates, admin approves (WhatsApp video + OTP), ships change. Self-monitoring + self-healing loop. Founder-only admin gate.

features.name: Supply & Demand page uses this data end-to-end
Auto-scraper cron for NEW monthly reports

systems.name: Reports & Analysis Pages
systems.description: /analysis has best filter+compare pattern; /reports has an indefinite spinner bug blocking load

systems.name: Widget Interactivity (new)
systems.description: Universal rule: every widget on every tab needs intelligent filters + user-input compare. /analysis + FilterBar shared kit + 4 pages retrofitted (Destinations, Forecasts, Pricing, News).

systems.name: BRM (Broker Relationship Management)
systems.description: Broker-scoped portal + graph. Brokers see MAXONS' needs + margin targets + market intelligence. Never see customer identities or supplier pricing. Phase 8 scope per vision handoff.

features.name: Broker-specific market intelligence view (which markets to focus/avoid)
Broker offer-management surface (post inventory into Cropsintel)
Info walls: broker queries never return customer identities or customer pricing

systems.name: SRM (Supplier Relationship Management)
systems.description: Supplier/packer-scoped portal. Suppliers see own shipments, county-level analysis tools, anonymized demand signals. Never see customer identities or MAXONS' margin. Phase 8 scope per vision handoff.

features.name: County-level analysis tool (supplier selects own sourcing counties)
Own-records input + variety mix / value share analysis
Anonymized demand signals (what the market wants, without revealing who)
Info walls: supplier queries never return customer identities or MAXONS margin

systems.name: Information Walls (DB + API + Portal)
systems.description: THE business model. Supplier/broker/customer each see only their permissioned slice. Enforced at 3 layers: Postgres RLS, API middleware, portal-scoped routing. Frontend-only is NOT security per vision.

features.name: Per-table RLS policies for crm_contacts, crm_deals, user_profiles
API response filter middleware (strip supplier source + margin before customer response)
audit_log table + write helper on every counterparty-data access
Portal-scoped routing: role determines which portal shell renders

systems.name: Commodity-Agnostic Schema
systems.description: Platform supports N commodities from day one. src/lib/commodity.js is the ONE switch point; supabase/schema_commodity.sql adds commodities + products tables; docs/COMMODITY_AGNOSTIC.md is the architecture reference. Migration of abc_* tables to commodity_id is Phase 8.

features.name: src/lib/commodity.js — runtime abstraction with almond/pistachio/pineapple registry
supabase/schema_commodity.sql — commodities + products tables + RLS + seed rows
Migrate abc_*_reports tables to reference commodity_id (Phase 8)
Replace hardcoded 'almond' literals in UI copy (Phase 7b)
Commodity selector in sidebar (defaults to almond)
Activate pistachio scraper when first data lands

systems.name: Multi-Portal Frontend
systems.description: Role-scoped portal shells: customer / supplier / broker / logistics / internal team. Login determines which portal renders. Same platform spine, different views.

systems.name: Trade Lifecycle (Offer → Contract → Fulfillment)
systems.description: End-to-end execution layer. Offer → margin engine → customer view → request to buy → sales verification → WhatsApp contract + e-sign → fulfillment tracking. Zyra orchestrates.

features.name: Offer builder with variety/grade/form/incoterm (existing in Trading Portal)
CRM deal pipeline with stage progression
Margin engine (applies MAXONS rules before customer display)
Source-hiding layer (customer never sees supplier identity)
Contract generation via WhatsApp link + interactive e-sign

systems.name: ADELA — Nervous System / AI Orchestrator
systems.description: Runtime orchestrator: routes jobs to the right AI provider (Claude, GPT, Gemini), enforces info walls in real time, coordinates intelligence pipeline. Currently 4 edge functions exist; ADELA is the router abstraction that sits above them.

features.name: Zyra chat uses Claude for all conversations
ADELA router abstraction (src/lib/ai-router.js) — swap provider per task
Multi-model debate pattern (brain-ai style: Claude + GPT + Gemini)
Info-wall enforcement hook in every AI response filter

systems.name: ATLAS — Self-Developing Brain
systems.description: Reads own plan, AI council debates, proposes changes, verifies, admin approves (WhatsApp video + OTP), ships. Self-monitoring + self-healing. Founder-only admin gate.

features.name: AI council debate: Claude + GPT + Gemini on each change
Admin gate: WhatsApp video + OTP authentication
Self-monitoring: catches errors, proposes fixes, feeds back

systems.name: Verified Social Network
systems.description: 'Twitter for verified' — gated behind access_tier='verified'. Post, react, comment, thread. Zyra participates as contributor. Two streams: public broadcast + private personalized.

features.name: Sentiment + chatter extraction into proprietary data

systems.name: Persona Views (new)
systems.description: Role-aware Persona Banner on /dashboard reads profile.role and renders a curated tagline + 3 shortcuts for 9 personas (Grower/Handler/Processor/Broker/Buyer/Trader/Analyst/Logistics/Finance). Full role-specific pages still pending — MVP ships persona awareness across the whole app.

Full Grower page (pool position, harvest timing, packer-call list)
Full Packer/Handler page (handler position, pool selling, quality mix)
Role-aware nav items (filter sidebar by relevance to role)

features.name: V1 user end-to-end OTP login verification (live test)

Forgot Password + Reset flow + admin role enforcement complete

cropsintel.com DNS cutover complete — domain live on GitHub Pages
Cmd+K command palette + OG meta tags + CSV exports
SOFT LAUNCH GATE REACHED — Phases 1-4 complete
CRM Phase 4: 15 issues + 12 AI enhancements shipped
Data integrity audit: 114 PDFs, 116 rows clean
Phase 3 AI Systems complete — all 4 edge functions live
72 real ABC PDFs scraped, position-report DB rebuilt

accessTiers.name: Verified
accessTiers.description: Admin/team can click ✓ Verify on any user in CRM Users tab — sets access_tier='verified' + stamps verified_at/verified_by. Delivers the 'verified people' promise on Welcome.

accessTiers.name: MAXONS Team
accessTiers.description: CRM + Trading gated, admin panel built

nextPriorities.title: Commodity-agnostic foundation
nextPriorities.description: products table + migration plan. Vision non-negotiable: never hardcode 'almonds'. Pistachio/pineapple come next.

nextPriorities.title: Information walls (DB RLS + API filter + audit log)
nextPriorities.description: THE business model per vision. Customer never sees supplier source; broker never sees customer pricing; supplier never sees MAXONS margin.

nextPriorities.title: BRM + SRM portal skeletons
nextPriorities.description: Third and fourth relationship graphs: brokers (market intel) and suppliers (county analysis). Portal-scoped views.

nextPriorities.title: Trade lifecycle margin engine + source-hiding
nextPriorities.description: Margin rules apply before customer-facing display. Source data stripped per info walls.

nextPriorities.title: ADELA AI-router abstraction
nextPriorities.description: Swap provider per task (Claude/GPT/Gemini) — multi-model resilience + right-tool-for-right-job.

nextPriorities.title: Full persona pages (beyond banner MVP)
nextPriorities.description: Grower/Packer/Trader/Buyer each gets a dedicated page, not just a banner on Dashboard.

nextPriorities.title: Verified social network MVP
nextPriorities.description: 'Twitter for verified' — feed + post + react. Gated on access_tier='verified'.

nextPriorities.title: Human-like Zyra (multilingual + natural voice) + V2 email launch
nextPriorities.description: F2-F4 from prior plan. Queues behind vision foundations.
